title: Project Analyze
noProjectDataDesc: Open a project or create locales to see analytics.
singleLocaleWarning: Only one locale detected — orphan file / key detection is unavailable.

orphanKeys.title: Orphan keys
orphanKeys.empty: Every key exists in every locale.
orphanKeys.fixDescription: This will add {{count}} missing keys (with empty values) across all locales.
orphanKeys.deleteDescription: Delete <k>{{key}}</k> from <ns>{{namespace}}</ns> in all locales? This cannot be undone.

orphanFiles.title: Orphan files
orphanFiles.empty: All files exist in every locale.
orphanFiles.fixDescription: This will create missing files for {{count}} namespaces in every locale that lacks them. Keys will be copied with empty values.
orphanFiles.deleteDescription: Delete <ns>{{namespace}}</ns> from all locales? This cannot be undone.

untranslated.title: Untranslated keys
untranslated.noSource: Select a source locale in the header to detect untranslated keys.
